message:
test(conformance): differential harness for stdlib.h qsort+bsearch vs glibc

CONFORMANCE: libc stdlib.h sort+search diff matrix.

2 functions, 4 tests:
- qsort_asc: 9 input vectors (empty, single, pre-sorted, reverse,
  random, all-equal, many-dupes, INT_MIN/MAX/0/-1/1 boundaries,
  mixed sign). Identical comparator on both sides; post-sort element
  sequence must match.
- qsort_desc: 3 inputs with descending comparator
- bsearch: present + absent probes against [5,10,...,100]; out-of-
  range / negative keys; INT_MIN/MAX; empty array → NULL on both

Caller comparator is pure (lexicographic int compare); both impls
must produce the same final order.

0 divergences observed.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
